overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic vehicles, and a transition through a covered glass plaza. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and dense urban architecture with holographic advertisements.

events.description: black sports car drives past on the left side of the walkway
blue sports car with white racing stripes passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk, observing passing traffic and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving past on the wet street

elevated highway or walkway structure crossing above the street
modern building facade with blue-tinted glass windows
thick structural column painted yellow supporting the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway in a rainy cyberpunk city, with neon billboards and glass buildings lining the path. Vehicles pass by on the wet street below while the camera moves forward under an overpass structure.

events.description: turning right at the intersection to approach the crosswalk
waiting at crosswalk as pedestrians with umbrellas gather

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and crossing the street toward the glass plaza entrance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at crosswalk, one holding an umbrella

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
tall black pole with traffic signals and illuminated yellow cross sign
large curved glass structure with teal neon lighting marking the plaza entrance

segments.scene_description: Turning right at a city intersection, the scene opens to a crosswalk with yellow stripes. Pedestrians gather near a traffic light pole as the camera approaches the entrance to a glass-domed plaza visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with neon-lit benches and glass dome

events.description: entering the covered glass plaza from the open street
passing by individuals seated on neon-illuminated benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza, passing people sitting on illuminated benches and observing the neon-lit interior

notable_agents.action: person sitting on neon-lit bench looking at phone

entered.detail: futuristic benches with pink and cyan neon underlighting
purple automated vending machine with glowing interface
trees in raised planters with white neon edging along the ground
large horizontal advertisement screen displaying All night. Every Night. text

segments.scene_description: Inside a covered glass plaza sheltered from the rain, the space features neon-lit benches, vending machines, and planters with trees. The camera walks past seated individuals toward a large advertisement screen at the far end of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards

events.description: exiting the covered plaza back to the open street
yellow flatbed truck drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: exiting the plaza and continuing along the wet street, observing passing vehicles and large advertisements

notable_agents.action: yellow flatbed truck driving down the wet street

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying colorful pizza advertisement
building entrance with prominent pink neon lighting and curved structure

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered plaza back into the rainy open street, the scene reveals large digital billboards including a prominent pizza advertisement. A yellow truck passes by on the left as the camera continues walking past a pink-lit archway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk cityscape that transitions from an exposed elevated walkway into a sheltered plaza before returning to the open street. It begins by moving forward along a pedestrian path lined with neon billboards and glass buildings, passing under an overpass while vehicles glide across the wet road below. As the camera turns right at a city intersection, the view opens across a yellow-striped crosswalk toward the entrance of a distant glass-domed plaza. The scene then shifts indoors, moving through a rain-sheltered space filled with neon-lit benches, vending machines, and planters before approaching a large advertisement screen. Finally, the camera exits the plaza back into the heavy rain, passing a yellow truck and a pink-lit archway beneath the glow of massive digital billboards.
